TITLE: The Hong Kong Jockey Club
LB_EWIN_TITLE: eWin at The Hong Kong Jockey Club
LB_EWIN_DESC: Racing, Football and Mark Six betting website with real-time odds, results and dividend. Transfer funds instantly into and out of betting account 24/7.
LB_RACING_TITLE: Horse Racing at The Hong Kong Jockey Club
LB_RACING_DESC: Provide Local & Simulcast race meeting info, detailed Horse, Jockey, Trainer statistics & analysis, with real-time odds, results & dividend and instant betting.
LB_FOOTBALL_TITLE: Football Betting at The Hong Kong Jockey Club
LB_FOOTBALL_DESC: Provide real-time odds & fixtures for League and Cup for instant betting, with comprehensive football statistics, match preview, detailed results and dividend.
LB_MARKSIX_TITLE: Mark Six at The Hong Kong Jockey Club
LB_MARKSIX_DESC: Get the Next draw & Snowball draw details. Check out the lotteries statistics, results & unit prize. Use the Drawn Number Checking to check the winning numbers!

LB_PLAY_RESPONSIBLY_CONTENT:
No person under 18 is allowed to bet or enter premises where bets are accepted.
The maximum penalty for betting with illegal or overseas bookmakers is 9 months' imprisonment and a HK$30,000 fine.
Don't gamble your life away. Call Ping Wo Fund hotline 1834 633 if you need help or counselling.

LB_BS_FT_PPS_PREVIEW:
Please have the following items ready and press "Confirm" to go to PPS's website to complete the process.

(1) PPS Account Number / PPS Account Name
(2) PPS Internet Password
(3) Registered mobile phone to receive the "one-time password"

Upon completed of the process, you will be redirected back to HKJC's website.

Note: To ensure a smooth transaction, please DO NOT close this Windows
or logout eWin while the transaction is in progress.

LITE_NEED_USE_MOBILE_TIPS: To get the best experience, please use mobile phone's portrait mode to browse Lite Betting Website.
LITE_NEED_USE_MOBILE_OR_PORTRAIT_TIPS: Please set your device to portrait display mode or use mobile phone to access the website
LITE_ACCOUNT_IN_USE: Your account is currently in use on another device. Please try again later.
LITE_ONLINE_SUMMARY: By clicking the "Continue in HKJC website" button below, this web page will be closed. If you do not see the Lite Betting Website, please log in Lite Betting Website again.
LITE_ONLINE_NOTES_MANUALADJUSTMENT: Your bank is processing the deposit instruction, please check your account records later.
LITE_ONLINE_NOTES_TIMEOUT: To confirm whether the transaction is accepted, please check your account records later.
LITE_ONLINE_NOTES_REFUNDSUCCESS_REASON_1:
Please make deposits through designated banking or payment apps using non-credit card accounts.

If you want to access the list of apps, or need more information, please refer to the FAQ.
LITE_ONLINE_NOTES_REFUNDSUCCESS_REASON_2:
Please make deposits through designated banking or payment apps.

If you want to access the list of apps, or need more information, please refer to the FAQ.
LITE_ONLINE_NOTES_REFUNDSUCCESS_REASON_3:
Please make deposits from bank accounts registered under your own name. Any funds from third-party or joint bank accounts will be rejected.

For more information, please refer to the FAQ.

LITE_SIGN_OUT_PASSIVE: You have logged out from Lite Betting Website, all unsent bet has also been deleted. Please login again.
LITE_RECOMMEND_BANK_DESCRIPTION: If you cannot use your banking APP to complete deposit via FPS, please try banking APPs shown below, or make your deposit at the racecourse or a betting branch with cash.
LITE_API_ERROR_CODE_3: Your account is being used by another system. Please try again later.
LITE_CAN_CLOSE_TRANS_LOADING_POPUP:
If you have confirmed or cancelled the transfer with the banking or payment app, please close this reminder. You may click the balance refresh button to check the latest account balance.

If your deposit has not been accurately reflected in your account balance, please call HKJC Customer Care Hotline 1818.
LITE_CAN_CLOSE_TRANS_LOADING_PAGE:
If you have confirmed or cancelled the transfer with the banking or payment app, you may close this page and check the latest account balance in the Lite Betting Website.

If your deposit has not been accurately reflected in your account balance, please call HKJC Customer Care Hotline 1818.
LITE_WITHDRAWAL_QR_CODE_EXPIRED: The withdrawal QR code is expired.
LITE_UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: To upgrade your Lite Betting Account, please install HKJC Classic 3-in-1 App on your mobile phone to continue.
LITE_UPGRADE_FOLLOW_STEP: After installation, please follow below steps:
LITE_UPGRADE_FOLLOW_STEP_2: Select "Don't have an account? Register Now"
LITE_UPGRADE_TABLET_TIPS: *This Upgrade Account feature is accessible only on mobile devices.
LITE_QUICK_VISIT:
Experience Race Betting
on the Go!
LITE_SCAN_VISIT_GUIDE: Scan the QR code with your mobile device to visit the Lite Betting Website
LITE_SCAN_REGISTRATION_GUIDE: Simply scan the QR code with your mobile device to access the Lite Betting Account registration page
LITE_SCAN_DESKTOP_MODE_NOT_SUPPORTED: Note: Desktop website mode on mobile device is not supported
LITE_ENSURE_ID_CARD_CLEAR: Please ensure your HKID card image is clear and the information below is identical to your HKID card
LITE_CHINESEGIVENNAME_EMPTY_ERROR_TIPS: Chinese Given Name cannot be blank. Please enter your Chinese Given Name.
LITE_CHINESESURNAME_EMPTY_ERROR_TIPS: Chinese Surname cannot be blank. Please enter your Chinese Surname.
LITE_MOBILE_NUMBER_EDIT_REMINDER: To update the mobile number,  please refresh the page to restart the registration process.  Please note that all filled information will be lost.
LITE_REGISTER_VERIFICATION_FAILED_UNDER_: No person under 18 is allowed to apply for Lite Betting account.
LITE_REGISTER_VERIFICATION_TOO_MANY_FAIL: Too many failed attempts, your application cannot be processed.
LITE_REGISTER_VERIFICATION_FAILED_MESSAG: Please scan your HKID card again
LITE_REGISTER_VERIFICATION_SCAN_CARD_NOR: Capture the front of the HKID card until the frame turns green.
LITE_REGISTER_VERIFICATION_SCAN_CARD_HOR: Adjust the angle of the HKID until the frame turns green.
LITE_REGISTER_VERIFICATION_FAILED_NO_CAM: Access to your camera is needed
LITE_REGISTER_VERIFICATION_FAILED_OS_BRO: Please update your operation system or browsers then try again
LITE_REGISTER_VERIFICATION_TIP_CARD_ANGL: Tilt the card's angle until your HKID card fits the box
LITE_REGISTER_VERIFICATION_TIP_CARD_GLAR: Adjust lighting or angle of card to reduce glare and shadow
LITE_REGISTER_VERIFICATION_TIP_LIGHT_ADJ: Move to a brighter location to scan your ID card
LITE_FPS_TNC: By clicking "Confirm" below, I confirm that I have read and agree to the <TncLink>Terms and Conditions for HKJC FPS Instant Funds Transfer Service</TncLink>
LITE_SCAN_LANDSCAPE_WARNING_01: Please keep your device in portrait mode when scanning your HKID card.
LITE_SCAN_LANDSCAPE_WARNING_02: If the white frame appears misaligned, tap the cross icon in the top-left corner to return to the previous page and try again.
GEOCHECKING_NO_HK_MESSAGES: Lite Betting Website is only accessible from Hong Kong. Please ensure you are located in Hong Kong to access the platform.
GEOCHECKING_NO_RC_MESSAGES: Lite Betting Account registration page is only accessible at Happy Valley Racecourse and Sha Tin Racecourse. Please ensure you are within one of these designated locations to access the page.
GEOCHECKING_UPGRADE_MESSAGES: You have not enabled location permissions for Lite Betting Website. Please turn on GPS on your mobile device and allow Lite Betting Website to access your location.
LITE_FPS_REFUND_REMAINING_COUNT_GREATER_: The FPS online deposit function will be temporarily suspended after {{remainingRefundCount}} more invalid attempts. Please ensure that you use a bank account under your personal name.
LITE_FPS_REFUND_REMAINING_COUNT_EQUAL_ZE: Due to multiple invalid FPS online deposit attempts, the function has been suspended. Please try again after 7:00 AM tomorrow.
LB_BS_CAN_ADD_BETSLIP: You may now add new selections
